Projects.Title: EliteShop E-Commerce
Projects.ShortDescription: Scalable platform using Blazor MAUI Hybrid.
Projects.FullDescription: A cross-platform e-commerce solution using Blazor MAUI Hybrid and EF Core. Features product catalogs, secure checkout, and hybrid native/web rendering.
Projects.Challenges: Optimizing state management between local MAUI containers and the web-based API.
Projects.Handling: Implemented a Unified Service layer with Dependency Injection, allowing seamless cross-platform performance tracking.
Projects.Stack: Blazor MAUI, EF Core, C#, ASP.NET Core API
Projects.RecruiterPerspective: Demonstrates hybrid mobile architecture and full-stack integration proficiency.

Projects.Title: ERP Payroll Engine
Projects.ShortDescription: Financial computation and TDS deduction system.
Projects.FullDescription: Precision engine handling complex salary computations, TDS deductions, and enterprise-grade reporting.
Projects.Challenges: Managing large-scale transactional integrity and dynamic regulation updates.
Projects.Handling: Utilized Repository patterns and high-performance SQL Stored Procedures for data integrity.
Projects.Stack: C#, SQL Server, Stored Procedures, EF Core
Projects.RecruiterPerspective: Exhibits deep technical acumen in backend financial engineering and SQL optimization.

Projects.Title: AI Restaurant App
Projects.FullDescription: Personalized dining experience using React and Redux, featuring a smart menu recommendation engine.
Projects.Challenges: Sub-second UI reactivity for real-time recommendation updates.
Projects.Handling: Leveraged Redux Toolkit for efficient global state and intelligent menu filtering algorithms.
Projects.Stack: React, Redux, JavaScript ES6+, CSS Grid
Projects.RecruiterPerspective: Showcases modern frontend excellence and AI integration sense.

Projects.Title: Doom-Style 3D Game
Projects.FullDescription: High-performance 3D engine built in Python, achieving 60 FPS using ray-casting algorithms.
Projects.Challenges: Optimizing loops for software-based 2D to 3D projection.
Projects.Handling: Implemented trigonometric optimizations and efficient tile-caching for real-time rendering.
Projects.Stack: Python, Math Pipelines, PyGame for Display
Projects.RecruiterPerspective: Highlights exceptional problem-solving and algorithmic logic beyond common web dev.

Experiences.Description: Engineering 15+ reusable Blazor components and optimizing internal dashboard performances with ASP.NET Core integrations.
Assisted in backend development and database schema design for financial management modules using Java ecosystems.
